fields.name: scheduled_departure
fields.doc: Scheduled departure as ISO-8601 UTC string (TIMESTAMPTZ)

fields.name: actual_departure
fields.doc: Actual departure ISO-8601 UTC string (TIMESTAMPTZ, null until departed)

fields.name: scheduled_arrival
fields.doc: Scheduled arrival as ISO-8601 UTC string (TIMESTAMPTZ)

fields.name: actual_arrival
fields.doc: Actual arrival ISO-8601 UTC string (TIMESTAMPTZ, null until arrived)

fields.name: flight_status
fields.doc: Operational status: On Time | Delayed | Cancelled | Diverted | Scheduled | Departed (VARCHAR 20)

fields.name: delay_minutes
fields.doc: Departure delay in minutes; negative values indicate early departure (BIGINT)
